creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alexander,

Thanks for your submition, but next time
user a diff tool instead of shar as explained
in the porter handbook[1]. Shar is only used
to submit new portrs.

Since this pach is very minimalistic may I sugest
you to include the changes to make your port works
with stagedir ? All the informations are provided 
in the porter handbook, in chapter 6.1[2].
If ok, please resubmit a pach.

Regards,
- rodrigo


[1] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/slow-patch.html
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/special.html#staging
